target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible large section of exposed brickwork and missing facade on central portion; multiple windows blown out; structural damage concentrated in one wing; consistent with 45-75% area damaged per doctrinal definition.

summary: One building assessed with SEVERE DAMAGE, confirmed, showing exposed brick and blown-out windows concentrated in one wing. The overall scene depicts a multi-story building with significant structural damage, particularly on its central facade, while other sections appear less affected. The damage likely renders the building uninhabitable and compromises its structural integrity.
